KAILAS 2024 Summer New Men's Lightweight Quick-Dry Shorts in Four Colors  
Professional Outdoor Grade!  
Breathable, Lightweight, Durable, Multi-functional  
3D Tailoring with advanced fabric technology: nylon and spandex blend, high-strength four-way stretch, abrasion and tear resistant, elastic fibers for high comfort and flexibility.  
Lightweight, thin, and close-fitting for professional summer use.  
Slim fit with panel stitching. Elastic waistband with adjustable drawstring. Waist button and zipper areas use heat-sealed bonding for a sleek, premium look.  
Seamless bonded zipper pockets with mature craftsmanship, durable after many washes.  
Gusseted crotch design for unrestricted movement and high comfort.  
Fabric treated with eco-friendly DWR water-repellent technology, soft, windproof, waterproof, quick-drying.  
Ergonomic 3D cut for better fit. All pockets reinforced with embroidered bartacks.  
High cost-performance outdoor functional style, fashionable and versatile.  
Colors: Black, Navy, Light Gray, Army Green  
Sizes: M - XL

KAILAS Spring/Summer New Outdoor Men's Quick-Dry Pants. Durable woven fabric with excellent breathability and freedom of movement. Abrasion-resistant and water-repellent. Military-grade 3D tailoring for unrestricted mobility. Simple, stylish design suitable for outdoor, sports, and casual wear. Adjustable waistband with drawstring. Two side zippered pockets for convenience. Slimming, height-enhancing fit. Colors: Black, Green. Sizes: L–XL (see size chart in image 9).

Original surplus vs. market goods difference:

KAILAS quick-dry pants with printed water-repellent stretch breathable fabric, suitable for work and casual wear. Genuine replica printing process, print lasts after many washes. Different from market embroidery version!

Outdoor hiking softshell pants with Shule XDry® technology fabric, men's sports outdoor Yubeng series. Made with durable CORDURA fabric for long-distance hiking, quick-dry, unisex.

KAILAS Hunter Wind series sports outdoor hiking mountaineering waterproof, windproof, breathable shell pants. Ideal for windy spring weather, suitable for hiking and commuting. Sturdy, stylish, practical.

Colors: Black, Gray-green  
Sizes: M, L, XL, XXL  
All measurements are manual flat-lay with ±1 cm error.

🖤 Main Image Details | Quality Long Pants 🆕🖤 KAILAS / 凯乐石  
🍂 Two Colors | T-X Series Outdoor Sports Softshell Pants with CORDURA  
 
- Fabric: Made with CORDURA nylon. High-density CORDURA reinforcements on knees and seat for durability; softer CORDURA fabric elsewhere for comfort.  
- Fit: Professional 3D tailoring with articulated knees and seat to reduce restriction during climbing and high-leg movements.  
- Details: Buttoned waistband for easy wear; side adjustment buckles for quick fit changes; large zippered pockets for secure storage; knee anti-bulge design; diamond gusset at crotch; windproof drawstring and internal boot hooks at cuffs to block wind, sand, and insects.  
- Breathability: Some models feature ventilation holes behind knees to release heat and sweat, preventing discomfort.  
- Durability: CORDURA fabric is highly abrasion-resistant, reinforced at key wear points to withstand long hikes and rough terrain.  
- Wind and Water Resistance: Effective windproofing and water-repellent finish to keep dry in light rain and block cold wind.  
 
Colors: Dark Teal Black, Pine Green  
Sizes: M - XL (waist, hip, length measurements available)

KAILAS Autumn New Arrival: Men's Outdoor Softshell Hiking Pants with Water-Resistant Protection (Includes Belt)

Combining professional outdoor functionality with everyday style, KAILAS outdoor pants strike the perfect balance—delivering rugged performance and versatile design for all your adventures.

▫️ Unisex Design, Breaking Style Boundaries  
Gender-neutral cut fits both men and women, suitable from daily commuting to mountain hiking. The relaxed yet tailored fit flatters all body types for effortless versatility.

▫️ Color-Block & Ergonomic Fit, Thoughtful Details  
Contrasting panels add visual depth. Ergonomically tailored 3D construction ensures unrestricted movement when bending or stepping, blending comfort with active performance.

▫️ Windproof & Water-Resistant, Ready for Changing Weather  
Outer fabric blocks wind and light rain, while breathable lining prevents sweat buildup. Perfect for city commutes or nearby trails.

▫️ Classic Earth Tones, Easy to Match  
Sophisticated earth colors pair well with hoodies, jackets, or sweaters—stylish for everyday wear and commanding outdoors.

Colors: Black, Gray, Khaki  
Sizes: M-XL (see size chart in image 9)

Details: KAILAS Women's Narrow-Leg Pants  
Lightweight, durable, highly elastic, tear-resistant outdoor climbing pants for women.  
New favorite for autumn and winter!  

Features:  
- Woven mountain fabric with full breathability.  
- Advanced quick-dry technology using Swiss Schoeller Dynamic high-elastic fabric absorbs and evaporates sweat fast, keeping skin dry and breathable.  
- Nanometer-level UV-resistant coating blocks over 90% UV rays, meeting UPF 50+ sun protection standards.  
- Double-stitched seams enhance structure and durability.  
- Silver ion antibacterial treatment inhibits common bacteria like E. coli and Staphylococcus aureus with over 90% antibacterial rate.  
- Outer fabric is stain-resistant and water-repellent; water beads roll off easily, resisting dirt and spills.  

Comfort & Fit:  
- Core high-elastic fibers with over 90% recovery rate maintain shape after intense activity.  
- Plain weave blended with spandex offers soft yet tough fabric that fits body curves without restriction.  
- Suitable for hiking, climbing, and daily wear.  
- Stylish design pairs well with quick-dry T-shirts or office shirts for versatile use.  

Craftsmanship:  
- Streamlined embroidery enhances detail quality and prevents item loss.  
- Elastic waistband for comfort and secure fit.  
- Multiple zippered pockets for secure storage.  

Color: Black  
Sizes: M to XXL  
(Size chart available upon request)  

KAILAS women's woven pants perfectly combine function, comfort, and style—ideal for autumn outdoor sports and everyday wear. Get yours to embrace the season.

KAILAS Autumn Embroidered Zipper Casual Outdoor Pants for Men  
Colors: Black, Army Green  
Sizes: M-XL  

These functional casual pants are perfect for daily commuting and outdoor sports. Made with a three-proof fabric that resists wind, water, and oil stains, they feature a stylish softshell design with a flattering fit. The pants have 3D embroidered logos on the leg pockets, seamless sealed pockets on both sides, and a sporty yet fashionable look.  

Crafted with professional-grade woven polyester fabric, they offer high elasticity, quick-drying, lightweight comfort, and wrinkle resistance. The pants include a seamless drawstring eyelet, YKK zippers, and stretchable, breathable fabric panels on the legs. A must-have for every man’s wardrobe.

Versatile for daily work or outdoor sports, making them your best choice for both casual and outdoor wear.  
Features 3D ergonomic tailoring for a comfortable fit, slanted pockets with YKK zippers, and 3D-cut knees for better movement and durability.  
Cold-resistant, warm, and water-repellent with soft fleece lining and triangular gusset design for enhanced flexibility and comfort.

Colors: Black, Gray, Khaki

KAILAS Autumn Embroidered Zipper Casual Outdoor Pants  
KAILAS men's daily commute wear, Xiaotai Spring/Summer new functional casual pants. Stylish outdoor softshell with three-proof technology: windproof, waterproof, and oil-resistant. Unique design with excellent fit and shape, featuring 3D embroidered logo on leg pocket for a textured, premium look. Seamless sealed pockets on both sides blend sport and fashion. Functional 3D tailored cut with clean lines. Made of professional-grade woven quick-dry stretch polyester with geometric texture—highly elastic, dry, lightweight, and wrinkle-resistant. Built-in seamless drawstring eyelets, YKK zipper, and stretchable, breathable fabric panels on pant legs. Highly recommended, a must-have.

Sizes: M-XL

KAILAS High-Performance Stylish Urban Sports Quick-Dry Shorts

Made from lightweight, highly elastic quick-dry fabric, soft to the touch, skin-friendly and non-sticky, with excellent moisture-wicking and quick-dry properties to keep you fresh during exercise. Suitable for various summer occasions, resistant to heat and humidity.

Features one-piece body construction to reduce seams, creating smooth and clean lines. Side slits at the hem enhance leg mobility. Fine stitching improves durability and quality.

Elastic waistband with internal drawstring fits different body shapes. Deepened side pockets for convenient storage of daily essentials.

Lightweight and breathable for all-day comfort. Versatile for sports, casual wear, fitness, and travel. Minimalist cut highlights body lines, combining fashion and functionality. A versatile piece for both active and everyday wear.
